reviews.review_text: Lovely place nice views quite and Clean
Had a lovely staying in lovely location. Totally worth it.
Amazing spot.
Convenient location with very chill and relax environment. Cleanliness of the place can be improved.

Full kitchen with stove, microwave, oven, kettle, cup, utensils, knife, rubbish bag, etc. Added points for coffee machine, super good coffee. The only drawbacks is it doesn't come with shampoo and shower gel, only provided soap
Beautiful car and park is n the river and a short walk into town. Clean amenities and right on the river with the ducks. Great place for out first stop on our trip x highly recommend

Pobyt w Riverview Tourist Park był bardzo udany i spokojny. Domki są wygodne, czyste i dobrze wyposażone, co zapewnia komfortowy wypoczynek. Dużym plusem jest bliskość natury i cicha okolica, idealna do relaksu. Cały teren ma przyjemny klimat i sprzyja odpoczynkowi. To dobre miejsce na krótki lub dłuższy pobyt z dala od zgiełku.

Enjoyed staying 3 nights (mid-March 2026) at
Riverview Tourist Park Margaret River.
Very helpful staff, great location, good amenities.
Cabin showing signs of ageing but clean, tidy & reasonably-maintained.
Reasonable value accommodation in the area, Cheers!

Enjoyed staying 3 nights (mid-March 2026) at |Riverview Tourist Park Margaret River.|Very helpful staff, great location, good amenities.|Cabin showing signs of ageing but clean, tidy & reasonably-maintained.|Reasonable value accommodation in the area, Cheers!

Fantastic 2 night stay in a deluxe cabin.
Lovely warm welcome,  exceptionally clean and tidy cabin, ample amenities for our stay.
Peaceful surroundings, Totally recommended staying here, short walk to town centre, albeit up a fairly steep hill.
Thanks for a memorable stay, see you next year 😊

Ein schöner, ruhiger Campingplatz! Nicht zu groß und fußläufig wenige Minuten vom Zentrum gelegen.
Saubere Toiletten und Duschen sowie eine moderne Geneinschaftsküche mit Kochfeld und Kühlschränken.
Sehr nettes Personal an der Rezeption!
We loved this place! We camped & the facilities were great, very clean & staff were very friendly. Perfect location. Just a short walk into town
5 stars

Sadly you guys have a really poor costumer service... we stay there a couple months back and had a blast and now we wanted to book again and the person on the phone really rude, not friendly at all and hung up on me. Not staying here ever again until you change the person on the office
Family friendly. Plenty of room in our deluxe cabin. Would recommend.
Our last minute booking was easy and quick  and the accommodation was top notch.  The park was quiet,  friendly and very well set out.  Highly recommended.

Wonderful relaxing atmosphere and great location
Walking distance to Margaret River main street and shopping
Clean and comfortable cabins
Friendly staff
Walking and kayaking along the river. Beach only a few minutes drive away.
Not luxury but basic but well presented and very clean.
Will we return...I think YES!
Had a beautiful stay here and can not wait to come back. Our small cabin was perfect. Clean, tidy, with all the amenities.

Stayed one night for my 30th Birthday, the cabin was immaculate. It had everything you could need. We accidentally went to the Margaret River caravan park first so make sure you put Riverside into maps. Such great value for money in the most beautiful location. The staff were also very helpful and friendly. We’ll be back!

We stayed in a 2-bedroom chalet in front of the river. The accommodation was comfortable and we had everything we needed. Location is very convenient, you can take the river walk to go to town, there are conoes for hire. Camp kitchens and other facilities are kept clean. And eventhough we went for NY, it was really quiet and peaceful. Also loved being surrounded by the local wildlife.

I really like this place a very relaxing atmosphere.
Staff were very nice the only  thing I didn't like is the bathroom was not very clean kinda gross around the toilet and floor area the whole room could do with a deep clean. But I would recommend staying here. This review is to not put people off its just a message for the management to keep on top of things that might get missed.
Perfect location scenic spot|Clean and very pretty gardens with plenty birds|Very good staff and well run|We stayed in a one bed chalet and it was perfect for us|Verandah a highlite

Had an awesome stay at Riverview tourist Park. Had an ensuite site and the staff are very friendly and helpful. The walking trail and river are just beautiful. Very clean and tidy and walking distance to town. Highly recommend.

Caravane park très bien équipé et de qualité.
Emplacement idéal calme et sur la rivière. Personnel disponible.
Bbq partout.

Amazing caravan park. The facilities were clean and the environment was really quiet. You can go for a walk close to the river. Thanks to the guy from maintenance Rashan, he was so helpful and kind. We would love to come back again.
The cabins are a little old but have been refurbished and have everything you need. The location near the river with the canoes for hire is great for kids.
It was okay . Average to my liking
Nice place for family. Come with kitchen. BBQ pit for public use near the lake.is not so clean so we never use it.

Had a large RV powered site, sites are very small, the whole park is very pokery they really pack everthing in, but amenties are very clean, staff very friendly.  Loved the river walk, the BBQ area down by the river, can walk to town, great location
Very friendly at check in.Clean chalet with good facilities.
We've been coming here for years and enjoying the getaway. The chalets are well established and the location nextvto the river is delightful.
If you have a tent or small van, this is not the place for you. The sites are so tiny and crammed together you may as well be sharing a sleeping bag with your neighbour. And it's not cheap.

Riverview Tourist Park sits on the banks for the Margaret River.  A smaller, cosy, Park, but very tidy, clean & far enough from the town to be quiet & peaceful but close enough to close to what you may need.  We stayed in a cabin which was big enough for two people with a balcony.  The cabin was well equipped with everything we would need for a comfortable stay.  The parks facilities are clean & in good working order.  We used the Barbeque to cook our dinner one night & they even provide equipment to be able to clean them with.  Because the park backs onto the Margaret River & surrounding National Park, we were able to enjoy a relaxing walk amongst nature.  A bonus of the park is we were visited every day by the local parrots & other wildlife.  Bliss!!
Great setting friendly  staff but terrible access for vans to get into to, yes sites fit big van getting them in a whole other story with narrow roads and campers accross from you
Comfortable place to stay!

For a seemingly modest park, Riverview Tourist Park punches well above its weight. Reasonably priced, even in peak season, well maintained and with all the amenities you could possibly need. We stayed in their one bedroom chalet which was well appointed and spotlessly clean. A two minute drive or short walk into town was handy, but located far enough away to be removed from the hustle and bustle. The park was quiet and serene, filled with bird song and beautiful flowers, the reception desk sold freshly laid eggs, and the best feature by far, was the fact that it literally ends at the banks of the river. Stunning any time of the year, but particularly during wildflower season, with the park offering canoes for hire. Thank you Riverview. Our stay was beyond my expectations and we will most certainly be back.

What a wonderful place to stay😁We stayed in the 2 bedroom unit with the riverview.Everything was beautiful and  clean.Loved sitting on the balcony and watching the ducks.We were even blessed to see 8 fluffy little ducklings.Even the parrots came to say hello😃😃The office staff were wonderful and friendly. Enjoyed every minute staying there.💖💖
Wonderful place, close to town centre and also very quiet.

We stayed at Riverview Tourist Park for one night and really enjoyed it. The parking area was spacious and easy to access, which made things very convenient. Our room was clean, well-kept, and comfortable for a short stay. The surroundings were peaceful with lots of birds and ducks around the park, which the kids absolutely loved watching and feeding. It’s a nice family-friendly spot and we’d be happy to stay here again when passing through.

Nice clean park ,great views
Spacious cabin
Clean spacious well presented
A nice quiet area on Margaret River. Close to everything. A great home base to branch out from.
Fantastic getaway in a nature escape with a town street with everything you need. We stayed one night and wished we had booked 2 nights and explored the valley

We are from Singapore.  My friends and I love this place so much. Lots of wild animals stop by the veranda, i.e., parrot, wild ducks, and other small birds. The place is clean with complete amenities.  Highly recommended.

We really enjoyed our stay at Riverview Tourist Park. The receptionist was very helpful and welcoming, and the cabin felt just like home – cozy, clean, and comfortable. Sitting on the veranda was lovely, with friendly birds coming by which made the stay even more special. The location is convenient, close to Woolworths and other shops, though the walk can be a bit hilly – we used the car since my travel partner uses a walking stick. Overall, a peaceful, relaxing, and very enjoyable stay!

The stay absolutely wonderful, that place exceeded our expectations.The staff was incredibly friendly and attentive!A 2-minute drive from the town center, all cafes and restaurants, groceries.Cool atmosphere!

Great place to stay!  Plenty of options available, this time I stayed in a well presented single motel room with queen size bed.  Had everything I needed for a comfortable stay after long day out riding the MTB trails.  Really enjoyed my time here, good vibes and great service.  I couldn't ask for more and looking forward to coming back in the near future.

My partner and I LOVE staying at Riverview!
It’s walking distance to town and also right on the river, surrounded by trees and gorgeous walking trails. The cabins have everything you need to cater to a great stay, + the wild birds are so friendly, eating food right out of my hand!
We will always come back here 🌳😊
Good location. A river runs beside the compound with a trail leading to shops and restaurants. Only wish it wasn’t raining. Would stay again
Staff were very helpful and friendly and it's close to the shops. Great place to stay
Quiet and comfy , has complete kitchen but the bathroom is not good enough, water heater not working properly.

We went there to celebrate my husband's birthday and its was perfect. Warm welcoming staff, perfect cute one bedroom chalet and the amazing scenic location. This is also situated walking distance to the town which is very convenient. Overall, we had a wonderful relaxing weekend and would definitely visit again.
We stay there for a long time ! Lovely park and lovely staff! Hope we can come back again !!!
Good location. Nice clean rooms.

There are no sockets near the bed. If you want to plug in an electric blanket, your only way is to find an extension cord under the bed. Then the extension cord makes a warning hissing sound when you insert the plug, so replace it.
Very small sites for caravans

Very nicely located tourist park in Margaret River. Walking distance to shops, restaurants and anything else you may need in the town centre. All chalets have everything that is advertised. Its nice and quiet and close to the river. Ample parking for each chalet. Kitchen has everything you need, except a dishwasher. Did not use the laundry this trip.I would definitely stay here again if I am in the region.
Brilliant stay at a fair price! Definitely recommend!
We had a beautiful powered site, Close to town, very friendly welcome,  dogs allowed. Perfect and peaceful would stay again.

Very very nice, was surprised how clean and tidy the chalet was,i recommended a pay rise for the cleaning staff, but that could cause our rent there to become more expensive haha. We will be going back there again, for a longer stay. Even the wildlife was happy we were there, turning up on our porch the following morning after we gave some treats for some breakfast. Beautiful place ................ thanks for having us
The river is very nice. In a great spot everything was clean.

We stayed at one of the cabins at the Riverview Tourist park recently. The cabin  was very clean, comfortable and well maintained. The park facilities were excellent. Staff was very helpful. The location is close to shop and restaurants. Would highly recommend their cabin accommodation.
Saya menginap selama 8malam,tempat yang indah dan tenang,burung dan bebek hidup dengan damai disini.taman dan bbq area adalah favourite, pasti akan kembali lagi!

Lovely park and staff. Good location next to the river and trails. Dog friendly too.|Unfortunately, too many of the Margaret River locals are rude and obnoxious, making visitors feel unwelcome, and this would be our onyl reason to not return.
Great location and lovely staff. We had a really nice stay here. Was quiet and felt quite private in our studio.
Fu  place to camp. Great service but sites a bit tight
Top spot, will return
Is a great spot to stay.. Plenty of Cabin, M/Homes ..
Old furniture and interior , no air conditioner inside the bedroom and water shower temperature was not not consistent. Basic amenities for cooking is available .
We stayed in an ensuite powered site. Great location on the river with walk trails everywhere. So peaceful and relaxing. We will be back.
Good value for money, we had a comfortable stay, an upgrade on the toilet paper would be nice

Booked a 2 bedroom cabin for a 4 day stay with another couple. Cabins are basic. The bed linen was clean and fresh, with a towel each provided for the 4 of us. that is where it ended. Just 1 hand towel and 1 very thin/worn bath mat provided for the 4 of us over 4 days. Very disappointed with this. As we were out before reception opening time (8.30am) and back just after 6pm (closing time 6pm) there was no one to be able to request extra items.Overall, the stay was ok, as we didn't need to use other facilities. Price wise, dividing the cost between 2 couples was fine, but wouldn't want to pay any more than we did for the basicness.

We were really happy to get the room right in front of the river. It was such a great view! The room was very clean and the environment was quiet, suitable for us who want a relaxing day off. Very close to all the restaurants and stores. Overall it was a great place to rest and relax, definitely gonna come back again!
A lovely little location overlooking the river and near shops

Always clean and tidy. Friendly people.
Unfortunately the wi-Fi was rubbish!

Super cute caravan park, very quiet and very well-maintained. Staff is lovely. Possibility to go for a walk by the river. They sell fresh eggs at the office, as well as bird seeds to feed the local parrots. I highly recommend it !

We camped in an RTT for an overnight stay - the site was perfectly sized and located for our purposes - but they are small sites and close to your neighbours. Very quiet and cosy. The service was excellent as were the amenities. Definitely recommend as a launch site to explore the Margaret River region.
Dù chỉ ở lại 1 đêm nhưng tôi rất hài lòng, phòng ốc tuy nhỏ nhưng sạch sẽ, ấm áp, đầy đủ tiện ích, sáng ra gặp chim chóc, vẹt, vịt, mèo rất đáng yêu 🧡

Sites were the smallest I've ever seen! You're basically an inch away from your neighbour. A bit expensive for what you get. But the ablutions were great! Nice showers and one of the best camp kitchens I've seen. Recommend checking out the path along the river!

It is  truly a ' home away from home ' experience in the lap of nature yet so central a location with great landscaping and very functional clean units... caring kind attentive hard working professional staff led by Steph - the Manager  !
you can have canoe

Lovely cabin BUT the floors, including bathroom were extremely dirty. Great facilities at the park, including camp kitchen ( but we did not use). Cabin had everything you need for your stay. Short drive from the centre of Margaret River or longish walk.

Comfortable and clean. We booked a 2 bedroom cabin for our family of four, with young kids. The little green patch of field besode the river is a lovely area where we saw many ducks and birds. This was a highlight for our city kids (who hardly see ducks in any other forms apart from being food on the table). Overall very value for money and we had a lovely time.
It was amazing place to stay during your trips.. rooms are amazing.. everything that you need will be available...
Tolle Lage am Margaret River. Haben 2 Tage im Haus Nr. 1 gewohnt. Sehr ruhig und sauber.

This weekend was 3rd time I have recently stayed at this park and again been happy with the customer service and amenities on-site.
It's for that reason, including unit availability, their very competitive rates & affordability of stay, (especially when considering other options around Margaret River) that I will continue to use this park as my preferred choice of  accommodation when staying in town.
Thanks to staff😀
Tidy and neat 👌, I can feel the staff's efforts, hot water wasn't work well

This was our very first time in Margaret River – and what a very positive start.  We were glad we had chosen this place and enjoyed our stay very much.  It was very quiet, very clean, had everything one would require for a short (or longer) holiday.  And it is reasonably priced (this was a very big contrast to one of our stays in Perth-Ascot where we stayed in a supposedly 4-star hotel, which was totally overpriced and didn’t even give some of the goodies we received at the Riverview Tourist Park).  We’ll gladly recommend this place.
Really good place for a family of four.Stayed only for a night but was peaceful and the place was well maintained with good air con and water heating.Near to town centre.Would stay again.

Great place for our kids and family.
We enjoyed and very ideal place to stay for your holidays

Riverview Tourist Park was such a positive experience! It was amazing for the price that it cost and the time that we were there. I wouldn't call it the fanciest of accommodations, but if you're looking for simple, basic, neat, clean and quiet, this is the place. Plus, it's SO close (walking distance) to great hikes and the main drag where the restaurants, cafes ect. are and it was so easy being there, I highly recommend and would plan to use them again next visit (which there definitely will be. Thank you for making my friend's birthday weekend such a treat in Margaret River!
Great place to stop.
Friendly service, super quick, easy to understand, well maintained and nice. Not luxury but that's not what we paid for. Well kept and happy for what we needed it for.
There are practically no facilities, but we were fortunate to be allocated a unit near the Margaret River, where kids are close to the nature :)

An affordable and comfortable stay.
We really liked the feel of the park, the river, trees and bird life, it has a very peaceful vibe. The staff were all so friendly and welcoming. All felt very down to earth and family run.
The unit was a little tired and lacked character but that’s reflected in the price which is very reasonable and the setting and location made up for it. All we needed.
Wifi just ok (fairly good for a tourist park) but improvements were planned I believe.
We will no doubt stay again! Thank you
Comfy place and in the budget. Also the river view next is good

Although the location is ok, we left extremely disappointed. The cabin I booked for three adults (one couple & one single) did not match the photos on the website in any way, shape or form.
We were first given a cabin with one dueen bed and bunks (two queens and two couches were booked), after questioning this we were offered another cabin, which still didn't match the photos, we were then offered three more cabins, all of which didn't match the photos either. None had two couches as photographed, forcing one person to sit on the dining room chair all night. Looking perplexed, the receptionist asked to see the photo I was talking about, which confused her even more, as she didn't think that was even a cabin in their park.
Comfortable place to rest your head & it's location is handy.

Only downside was phone and wifi coverage but not the worst. Have stayed at Riverview a few times over the years. A great place to stay with the family. A great home base to come back to after exploring.
Beautiful place
Comfy bed, clean room. Good location and friendly staff
Beautiful caravan park and friendly staff.
Will be back .Everything was awesome .For the price can't go wrong so close to town .

5x2 square of lawn for our tent, claustrophobic for me but we arrived late and didnt book anything & had 2 dogs, exceptionally clean shower block, handy walk from bars, turned out great but wouldve preferred cabins but we had dogs.....heaps were empty..lol

This is one of the nicest caravan parks we have stayed in, eveything was in emaculate conditions, gardens, driveways, toilet blocks. Maybe a little tight to get into caravan spots but all in all a lovely park and would definately go back and recommend to anyone. 😊
Also down by the river feeding the birds was lovely.

What a such great experience I had T Riverview Tourist Park! Everything was great - service, cleanliness, check in.

I highly recommend it for anyone, like family, friends or labours.

I will definitely stay there again :)

We love the quietness of the park and having direct access to the river and walking trails. Our dogs, Labrador retreivers, think it is the best caravan park ever as we can walk straight to the river paths for their morning walk. Staff are always friendly and helpful.

I was surprised at how beautiful the chalets are. It is a bit pricey but so is everything in MR. There's a fully equipped kitchen with stove, microwave, fridge, a nice living area and a small bedroom.
There's a way to walk down the river, rent a kayak, BBQ pits, laundry, and so on. The park is lovely.
I checked in after reception hours and the staff gave me clear instructions on where to find the keys.
Overall a very pleasant stay!
Spacious cabin and well presented and priced

A really nice place to stay at for when you're in the region. Stayed in a motel room style cabin which was great for one person and right next to the communal kitchen which wasn't the most impressive but good for cooking some simple stuff. It's less than a 5 mins drive into the lovely little town or a 15 mins walk.
Beautiful location, clean room, great service.
Beautiful location  by the river. Abundant birdlife. Excellent walks along river and into town. 15min walk into town.
Lovely stay at Riverview. Picturesque and quiet. Lovely river walk into town. I will be back 🙂

The staff was friendly and helpful. It has many different options of the room.
The one we stayed was tiny but clean. It had kitchen,dining/ living area and air conditioning.
It’s a bit hard for us to open 28 inches suitcase. Otherwise everything was good and we had a wonderful stay.
close to town, peacefull atmosphere, natural wildlife and down next to the river
Perfect place with beautiful nature and lovely services. The house was clean and very up to standard, well equipped and very quiet. Would definitely recommend this beautiful place, won’t disappoint.
Nice clean rooms the lady who checked us in was friendly and helpful she lent us an iron and ironing board my wife and I would stay again in future.

Riverview is amazing. The accommodation is so clean, spacious and quiet. The bed was comfortable and the shower pressure was perfect. It was my first time staying here and I enjoyed it. Thr prices are great too, well worth every cent. Easy walk into town and a the river/tracks near by. Staff are very friendly.
Thank you 😊
It exceeded my expectations from seeing the place in person. It's well-mainted, cozy and smells great! All the basic needs in the cabin are provided. We enjoyed our stay!
Brilliant spot best in Margaret River. Highly recommend

Beautiful place and very friendly staff. The units are a good size and well equipped and maintained. Love the birds coming in for a feed each morning. Loved our stay here.
Thank you♥️

The staff I engaged with were very friendly. I stayed in a studio room, which had all the amenities needed, including a hot shower, toilet, kitchen necessities and air-conditioning. It was a lovely, peaceful stay the 4 nights I was there, right near the river so there was a minor presence of the beautiful local wildlife. I certainly recommend staying here if you're visiting Margaret River.
Wonderful position. Very good accommodation. We were visiting from Spain

Wonderful place to stay in Margaret River, is so close to town you have all the comfort but at the same time you are surrounded by nature.
The bench near the river is the perfect spot to take a moment to relax!
Our cabin was perfect and met all our necessity, also it was spotless clean.
And of course Steph and Donna are amazing and always helpful!
Fab and I hope to see each other again very soon 😊 thanks for everything!
nice stay

Beautiful quiet hidden gem
Staff absolutely lovely
Will definately be my choice for down south stays
An amazing place to stay, we will definitely be back here.

Such a great place to stay! Terrific location, easy walk to town. From checking in, right through to leaving it was a brilliant experience. Friendly check in process with no dramas at all. The cabin itself was far bigger than many others in the area. Super clean and modern with one of the most comfortable beds I’ve slept in for ages.
Highly recommended !

Un gioiello.
Dotato di tutti i comfort necessari mi ha fatto sentire a casa.
Clean neat and tidy but could do with an update
Great place to stay
Riverview tourist park was a great place to stay I would recommend its such a relaxing place to stay. You are close to the river and the wildlife.

We have just had 4 days in a cabin, we stayed last year in a camper van and we can highly recommend your stay. Everyone was very helpful and always very pleasant....Ideal a great place to stay...
Thanks so much.
Roy & Cheryl (UK)

Lovely spot, close to town, near the river, we had an ensuite site very happy, nice and private, caravan spots a bit tight to get in but enjoyed our stay. Had our little dog and she was very welcome. Staff very friendly and helpful.
Great cleanliness. Would recommend 👌
Perfect location for the Cape To Cape MTB Event - quiet and close to Margaret River centre for food and drinks.
Very nice staff and overall pleasant experience. Would definitely come back
A short and excellent stay in a cabin. Everything so clean , quiet, just what we needed, thank you
Verry good place to stay also near a river
Perfect spot lovely staff beautiful surroundings..enjoy
Great place to stay to explore the area
Is good  here nice
Lovely park with friendly and efficient staff in a fantastic location right on the water.
Great place to stay

We stayed for a week in a cabin in the middle of July with a 2 year old and it was FANTASTIC!

Upon arrive we were greeted by Donna who was so warm and welcoming. When we got to our cabin we found it pristine clean and with a highchair like we had requested.

Proper mattresses in both the king and queen bedrooms, with proper quilts and electric blankets, so we slept well and warm. The kitchen was decked out with all the utensils etc that we required as well.

The area was so peaceful and quiet and we were able to feed the birds just outside our front door. It was a really wonderful family holiday thanks to great accommodation!

We arrived just before the office closes at 6pm. The girls at the office were super friendly and helpful. They suggested where we can grab our dinner. As the front room is not installed with a heater, they offered a portable fan heater for me to use which turned out to be a blessing. The rooms were very clean and we totally enjoyed our stay there. We even got to see a sky full of stars!! Overall, very happy with our booking.
Neat and tidy park polite staff and great location easy walk to and from town.

Room was ok. Sink stained but clean , very chemical smell. TV didn't work and couldn't be fixed.
Park around was pretty, lots of gardens and birds.

Thoroughly enjoyed each and every second at our deluxe holiday unit. I cannot express how much satisfaction I have with our accommodation. It was clean and comfortable everywhere, including the showers and kitchen. I liked how the kitchen is separate from the bedroom, we are able to close the door to prevent any cooking smells and with the rangehood.

We enjoyed the location of the nearby trails as well. Stars are able to be seen from time to time when the skies are not so cloudy. We were also able to connect to Netflix and enjoy our favourite shows after a long day of hikes and whale watching in Augusta.

Overall, fantastic experience I will continue to rave about with adequate facilities. It is a quiet location with Woolworths just down the road and the heart of the town only 5 minutes or so away. Smoke alarms in the living and bedroom. Would be keen to see a clock installed in the unit.

I literally cannot wait to stay with Riverview again. Super amazing, so happy. Glad we stayed here over our initial choice within the town. Big shoutout to the reception ladies we met during check-in and check-out. Super friendly... as well as Frank the duck (definitely say hi to him if you get the chance!). Thank you for having us, can't wait for the next stay!
We had a powered site, amenities were clean and fresh, found the showers to be a bit on the small side, but other than that very good

Well located to main retail strip in Margaret  River. Cabins well appointed, various size cabins available. A well developed site, each cabin having own car parking space. Good family atmosphere. Quiet at night. Best sleep ever. Highly recommend.
Very awesome resort villa in Margaret River. Amenties are good and parking was easy. Will be back again!

Lovely, comfortable cabin with deck overlooking the river. Easy walk to township of Margaret River or along walking track to the Old Margaret River township/ museum & beautiful forest walks.
Excellent facilities, well maintained.
Convenient location from which to explore the Margaret River region & all it has to offer !
Highly recommend for a relaxing stay !

Clean and cosy accommodation in a peaceful setting. Everything you need including a great hot shower! Very friendly staff. The centre of town a 10 minute walk away, the forrest and river a 5 minute walk away, the best of both worlds! Excellent location, service, facilities and prices, we will definitely be staying here again. Thank you!
